好嘟！

I'm sorry if this is the wrong channel or inappropriate to suggest but I didn't know where else to post this 😭... 

Maybe I'm just blind but I noticed there are Instagram accounts for neither the game nor the developing studio so I just wanted to suggest for the game to also have some presence on Instagram maybe 💖 I'm not sure if it's too much work to manage/ too expensive or if it's actually a planned choice, but it might help gain more players if people can follow and tag the account with their fan creations like fanart, videos or cosplay or other content? I'm a cosplayer and artist myself and absolutely want to do a Morimens cosplay too in the future...so don't be shy and let me and the other content creators tag you guys <:rizz:1172627562095198228>

Also please upload more of the OSTs on spotify, they're so beautiful and it's sad that there's only the few tracks on there so far 🏃🏃🏃🏃  (And I hope that one day you will maybe exhibit at trade fairs like Gamescom!!)

Thank you for your suggestion. Currently, there is no manpower available to build more platforms<:please:1356053110375714817> 

We will continue to upload previously released OSTs on Spotify, and of course, new OSTs will also be released on it. We have been preparing for a new version recently, so we have suspended it. We will strive to continue uploading this week<:Emoji_AJE_M_04:1400771555939844149>

No problem!!! I was already considering that the team might be too busy, but maybe it's a good idea for the future! <:flowers:1233344885638299658> And thank you so much, I'm looking forward to future uploads!! You and your team are doing amazing work, remember to rest and drink enough in this summer everyone <:blush:1233347996603777064>
Thank you🥹 , your concern and affirmation have warmed our hearts<:love:1356053099931897977> <:love:1356053099931897977> <:love:1356053099931897977>

Kathigu-ra is a pretty nice unit and it can be very strong, but the difference from E0 and E3 is to much, her gameplay is severely impeded if she don't have those initial Fiamma stacks, limiting her viability and enjoyment. 
I hope that, like for Doresain, that mechanic can be integrated in her base kit, reworking the E3 bonus and, to compensate, potentially slightly lowering the scaling with Combustion stacks to account for it.
The point is to make her still strong if invested but not as bad at base level, considering that she is out at the same time as a very loaded rerun, so heavy investing is an harder ask.

I am on story chapter 4, and after the update rolled out, any text that has more than 2 lines of dialogue speeds up to the next line and scrolls down until it reaches the last 2. This sometimes leaves no time to read the first lines, specially when the text is 4 lines long, where it almost instantly disappears from view. Attemping to scroll back up by clicking and dragging does not work, and only forwards to the next text, while the scroll wheel also doesn't do anything to scroll the text back. Only means so far to see the entire text with this is to open the text log on the top right corner, which comes with another problem as it does not let you forward to the next dialogue unless you close it and click on the screen. Is this intentional or a bug? And if it is intentional, is there a way to fix it or any plans for settings regarding this?
I'd like to suggest the option to drag the text to scroll it up with the mouse, and to be able to forward the dialogue text while in the text log screen.
